member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication — login, register, JWT refresh.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(IDADRS.Application.DTOs.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticate with username + password. Returns JWT access + refresh tokens.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(IDADRS.Application.DTOs.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a new user account (default role: User).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(IDADRS.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController
member.summary: Category management — full CRUD.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all categories with document counts.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get single category.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController.Create(IDADRS.Application.DTOs.CategoryCreateDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create category (Archivist+).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController.Update(System.Int32,IDADRS.Application.DTOs.CategoryCreateDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update category (Archivist+).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.CategoriesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete empty category (Admin only).

member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController
member.summary: Document CRUD, multipart upload, signed download URL, and full-text search.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all documents.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a single document with a 1-hour signed download URL.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Create(IDADRS.Application.DTOs.DocumentCreateDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upload a new document (multipart/form-data). Max 50 MB. Types: PDF DOCX XLSX PNG JPG.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Update(System.Int32,IDADRS.Application.DTOs.DocumentUpdateDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update document metadata (title, description, category).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete a document and its stored file.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Search(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Full-text search — PostgreSQL GIN index + native C TF-IDF re-rank.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.ServeFile(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Serve a file after validating the HMAC-SHA256 signed URL.

member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Controllers.ReportsController
member.summary: Usage statistics, audit trail, and file exports.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.ReportsController.Usage(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Aggregate usage stats (doc count, categories, users, access events).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.ReportsController.Audit(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Paginated audit log of all access events.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.ReportsController.ExportPdf(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Export report as PDF text (Admin only).

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.ReportsController.ExportExcel(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Export report as CSV (Admin only).

member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: User management — Admin only.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all registered users.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get user by ID.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.UsersController.Update(System.Int32,IDADRS.Application.DTOs.UpdateUserDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update username, email, or role.

member.name: M:IDADRS.API.Controllers.UsersController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Permanently delete a user account.

member.name: T:IDADRS.API.Middleware.AccessLogMiddleware
member.summary: §5 — Logs every authenticated document request to the access_logs table.
